product_description: Cloud FinOps and Kubernetes cost optimization SaaS that reduces cloud spend by 20-30% through automated anomaly detection, rightsizing, and team accountability workflows.

icp.primary: Mid-market and enterprise DevOps/FinOps teams in SaaS, eCommerce, and digital-native enterprises with $1M+ annual cloud spend
icp.secondary: SMBs with rapid cloud growth and at least $250K annual cloud spend

partner_program_objectives: Accelerate EMEA coverage via reseller partners
Increase SMB velocity using referral and reseller motions
Land co-sell in enterprise with 2-3 strategic SI/consultancy partners
Pilot OEM/white-label in APAC with one platform partner in Year 2
differentiators: Automated idle resource detection and rightsizing suggestions
Native integrations with AWS, Azure, GCP, and Datadog
Policy-driven cost guardrails aligned to budgets
